narration: What if I told you that not all research is peer-reviewed?

narration: Preprints are research papers shared before peer review. They spark debate and discovery.
visual_description: Context visual: Preprints are research papers shared before peer review. They spark debate and discovery.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Preprints are research papers shared before peer review. They spark debate and discovery.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Preprints are research papers shared before peer review. They spark debate and discovery.

narration: But why are they controversial? Some argue they spread misinformation.

narration: Yet, they accelerate scientific progress, allowing immediate feedback and collaboration.

ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: Yet, they accelerate scientific progress, allowing immediate feedback and collaboration.
